hypothesis: The combination of Aroon, EMA and a custom made filter to identify trends in the market, Bollinger Bands, Keltner Channels, Donchian Channels for volatility levels, MACD for trend strength along with Fibonacci Levels , RSI, Stochastic Oscillator, Momentum, On-Balance Volume(OBV), Commodity Channel Index (CCI), Average Directional Movement Index(ADX) and a combination of custom filter to avoid false signals in ranging markets will work together as a system which can provide more accurate buy/sell opportunities
